Thomas Hayford
About Story Now Projects Journal CV
About

I help businesses grow by combining relationship depth with execution discipline.

I am Thomas Nyarko Hayford, a Ghanaian business professional. My current role is Relationship Manager at Hubtel. I also founded Iderwell and continue building practical systems that help businesses perform better.

Born in Obuasi, with school foundations at Holy Child and St. John's School - Sekondi before proceeding to the University of Cape Coast in 2014.

Message on LinkedIn Send WhatsApp Message

Portrait

Career Snapshot

Hubtel (2023 - Present)

Retailer Relationship Executive, then Relationship Manager from March 2025.

Operations and QA

Operations Assistant and freelance software testing across different environments.

People and Process

Early HR and data verification roles built my discipline for structure and detail.

Verified Highlights from CV

Retailer cancellations reduced

From 20% to 8% through proactive support and readiness checks.

Merchant enablement

Supported businesses moving from USSD flow to stronger digital integration.

Education foundation

St. John's School - Sekondi (General Arts, 2009-2013) before University of Cape Coast from 2014.

Credentials and Activity Highlights

Certifications

2024 learning track completed

IBM and SkillUp EdTech certificates in software engineering, mobile app development, and Android basics.
